fullText:
The Window on World Theme Park is an amusement park in Longtan District, Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

The park was established in 1984.




 * Mini Taiwan
 * Mini China
 * Mini Asia
 * Mini Europe
 * Mini America

 * Taiwanese Folk Art Theater
 * OPEN! Costume Show
 * Lucky's Adventure
 * Funny Clowns

The theme park is accessible by bus from Zhongli Station of Taiwan Railway or Songshan Airport Station of Taipei Metro.
